creator: jin@eubie.lbl.gov
text:
% uname -r
4.0-19990918-CURRENT

% dmesg
...
sb0 at port 0x220 irq 5 drq 1 on isa0
snd0: <SoundBlaster 16 4.13> 
sbxvi0 at port 0xffffffff drq 5 on isa0
isa_compat: didn't get ports for sbxvi
snd0: <SoundBlaster 16 4.13> 
WARNING: "snd" is usurping "snd"'s cdevsw[]
unknown0: <CMI8330/C3D Audio Adapter> at port 0x530-0x537,0x388-0x38f irq 9 drq 0 on isa0
unknown1: <CMI8330/C3D Audio Adapter> at port 0x310-0x311 irq 10 on isa0
unknown2: <CMI8330/C3D Audio Adapter> at port 0x200-0x207 on isa0
ep0 XXX: driver didn't set ifq_maxlen
...

The sound system stops working:

% timidity music/club.MID
MIDI file: music/club.MID
Playing music/club.MID
Format: 1  Tracks: 5  Divisions: 192
Track name: Drums     
Track name: Track8    
Track name: Track9    
Track name: Track10   
^C



^C
^C^C^C^C^C
^C^C^C^C^C

process hanging

% dmesg
...
sbxvi0 at port 0xffffffff drq 5 on isa0
isa_compat: didn't get ports for sbxvi
snd0: <SoundBlaster 16 4.13> 
WARNING: "snd" is usurping "snd"'s cdevsw[]
unknown0: <CMI8330/C3D Audio Adapter> at port 0x530-0x537,0x388-0x38f irq 9 drq 0 on isa0
unknown1: <CMI8330/C3D Audio Adapter> at port 0x310-0x311 irq 10 on isa0
unknown2: <CMI8330/C3D Audio Adapter> at port 0x200-0x207 on isa0
ep0 XXX: driver didn't set ifq_maxlen
Waiting 15 seconds for SCSI devices to settle
changing root device to da1s1a
da0 at ncr0 bus 0 target 0 lun 0
da0: <SEAGATE ST12550N 0013> Fixed Direct Access SCSI-2 device 
da0: 10.000MB/s transfers (10.000MHz, offset 8), Tagged Queueing Enabled
da0: 2040MB (4178874 512 byte sectors: 255H 63S/T 260C)
da1 at ncr0 bus 0 target 2 lun 0

da1: 10.000MB/s transfers (10.000MHz, offset 8), Tagged Queueing Enabled
da1: 2040MB (4178874 512 byte sectors: 255H 63S/T 260C)
sb_reset_dsp failed
SoundBlaster: DSP Command(0xd5) timeout. IRQ conflict ?
SoundBlaster: DSP Command(0xd9) timeout. IRQ conflict ?
SoundBlaster: DSP Command(0xd5) timeout. IRQ conflict ?
SoundBlaster: DSP Command(0x41) timeout. IRQ conflict ?
SoundBlaster: DSP Command(0x7d) timeout. IRQ conflict ?

SoundBlaster: DSP Command(0xff) timeout. IRQ conflict ?
SoundBlaster: DSP Command(0x0f) timeout. IRQ conflict ?
SoundBlaster: DSP Command(0xd9) timeout. IRQ conflict ?
SoundBlaster: DSP Command(0xd5) timeout. IRQ conflict ?
